_meta.name: English
_meta.description: Default catalog. Source of truth for all keys.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to that.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again.

signup.missing_required_fields: All required fields must be filled.
signup.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
signup.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.disposable_email_blocked: This email provider isn't supported. Please use a permanent email address (not a disposable / temporary one).
signup.registration_failed: An error occurred during registration. Please try again.

premium_required.message: Premium unlocks Steve in DM, feed, and eligible chats — up to {steve_uses_per_month} Steve conversations per month and {whisper_minutes_per_month} minutes of voice-note summaries each billing cycle.

daily_cap.message: You've hit today's Steve limit of {ai_daily_limit} calls. It resets at {resets_at_daily}.

monthly_steve_cap.message: You've used all {steve_uses_per_month} Steve calls for this month. They reset on {resets_at_monthly}.

monthly_whisper_cap.message: You've used all {whisper_minutes_per_month} minutes of voice-note summaries this month. They reset on {resets_at_monthly}.

community_pool_exhausted.message: This community's shared Steve pool is empty for this month. Premium members can still use their personal allowance.

rpm_exceeded.message: You're sending requests too fast — slow down for a moment and try again.

hpm_exceeded.message: You've hit the hourly rate limit. Try again in a little while.

special_technical_cap.message: You've hit a technical safety cap. This protects the platform against runaway usage — it'll clear shortly.

community_suspended.message: This community is currently suspended. Steve features are paused until the community is reinstated.

grace_expired.message: Your Enterprise seat has ended. Subscribe to Premium to keep using Steve.

billing.subscription_inactive: You don't have an active subscription.
billing.checkout_failed: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
billing.portal_failed: Could not open the billing portal. Please try again.

communities.not_a_member: You're not a member of this community.
communities.admin_required: Only community owners or admins can do that.

invite.already_member: This user is already a member of this community.
invite.root_only: Invites can only be created from root communities.

join.used_invite: This invitation has already been used.
